name: Faux Wood and Brass Kitchen Clock and Timer - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Keep track of time while cooking with the Kitchen Clock and Timer from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. This analog clock features a round design with a timer for added convenience. The wall clock features an off-white face that complements the frame, creating a beautiful look. Complete with a brass hook for easy wall hanging, this kitchen clock requires one alkaline battery.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
